title: Copper++
description:
A mod that makes copper better
• Adding new tools, furnace, oxidation of items and more.
body:
# **Description**
>This is a mod that makes <font color="FFA500">co</font><font color="FF8C00">p</font><font color="808000">p</font><font color="556B2F">er</font> better and more useful, and I hope you enjoyed it.
## SUMMARY
- Oxidation For Copper Items (<font color="orange">only in player inventory</font>)
- If you want to speed up the oxidation of items or blocks, just throw them into a cauldron with water!
- Oxidized Copper Ingot Variants
- Copper Nuggets
- Copper Tools
- Oxidized Tools Variants
- **Iron and Lapis Required Copper Tools**
- Waxedator. Can waxed 128 blocks 
- Rabbit Stew in Copper (give effects: haste 2 for 2 min, speed 2 for 5 sec and strength for 5 sec)
- Production Furnace (melts faster all the items that were specifically for the furnace)
- Copper Bars
- Vanilla like Structures

## Added Features
![some mod features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e1029cf399c6aaae903c21e3f95cc3789551b0.png)
### Oxidation for Items (only in player's inventory)
- #### Oxidized variants of copper ingots:
 ![all copper ingots variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe999246d9a78e03b4c7b7dace2735102f6e5cc.png)
- #### Copper tools and their oxidized variants (all variants have their own specifications) :

![mod tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61417562a5fca264f2781dda72ac438f11fc9612.png)

### Production Furnace
melts faster all the items that were specifically for the furnace.

![pf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557108c23001a8379544cdae11d91610be1ab7d0.png)

## New Vanilla like Structures
### Production beta
![structure!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dacadd48019c1be37fd357424ba258f2e3a6bd72.png)
### Production Alpha Zero
![oxidized structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d8082038bbcc0781ba190982da248d2d12864be.png)

<details>
<summary>there is something interesting in production alpha 0!</summary>

![secret room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37035387fa9cb1c5a69802f7618afedc77291d2b.png)

</details>




### Copper bars
![copper bars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/637550fc3022ad3d25ceda7b2ec58e5ffb6bca6d.png)



## Future Features
- Villager profession for production furnace
- fabric compatibility
- And much more

## Recipes
All items use intuitive vanilla-style recipes included creation block with new ingots except:

#### Production Furnace Recipe

also for other oxidation states

![pf recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/770e020bb77996564c1f38c3f60a55c931d0fc4f.png)
![pf recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf84308e19ffa30248433b990f7e10491289650f_0.webp)
